channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran war widens, threatens to engulf Lebanon
item.description: The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as Lebanon's militant group Hezbollah responded to the killing of Iran's spiri...

item.title: Peer pressure can make this clownfish change its stripes
item.description: Tomato clownfish, in response to an unpredictable world, appear capable of adjusting when they lose their stripes based on cues from other fish and th...

item.title: Hezbollah strikes Israel as American and Israeli planes pound Iran
item.description: Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and th...

item.title: U.S., Israel's war with Iran widens. And, Texas primaries test Latino support for GOP
item.description: Israel trades fire with Hezbollah, widening the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran into Lebanon. And, Texas primaries could test if Latino support for th...

item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It ...

item.title: Deadly Texas bar shooting 'potentially act of terrorism', FBI says
item.description: Two people were killed and 14 injured, with the suspected gunman, identified by some media outlets, also shot dead.

item.title: Michael B Jordan upends Oscars race as Sinners wins big at Actor Awards
item.description: The US star's best actor win for Sinners leaves the Oscars race too close to call.

item.title: Watch: Video appears to show US F-15 fighter jet crashing in Kuwait
item.description: The US says six of its F-15 jets were "mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses", with all crew in a stable condition.

item.title: Oil prices jump and shares fall as conflict escalates
item.description: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.

item.title: 3/1: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran continue into a second day after the death of Supreme Leader ...

item.title: 3 U.S. F-15s mistakenly shot down by Kuwait but all crew safe
item.description: Three American fighter jets were "mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses," CENTCOM said in a statement ​Monday, as the war with Iran continued f...

item.title: Photos showing last moments of men executed by Nazis appear on eBay
item.description: The photos showed "the last moments" of 200 men executed at an Athens shooting range on May 1, 1944, Greece's the culture ministry said.

item.title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
item.description: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.

item.title: At least 4 U.S. troops dead as Iran lashes out at America's Gulf allies
item.description: Day 3 of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran sees America's military death toll rise to four, and skies full of missiles as Persian Gulf allies take hits.

item.title: Trump says Iran operation could take "four weeks or less," 3 U.S. troops killed
item.description: The U.S. military says three troops have been killed in the war with Iran, as President Trump says the operation is proceeding "ahead of schedule." Fo...

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson returns home to South Carolina to lie in state
FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed and five others seriously wounded during the attacks on Iran.
